commit.message:
fix: migrate identity URLs from customer-idp.mark8ly.com to identity.fanzonebattleground.com

The customer-idp.mark8ly.com DNS record no longer exists, breaking all
OIDC login flows (Keycloak redirect fails with NXDOMAIN). Keycloak
already reports identity.fanzonebattleground.com as the issuer for all
realms (fanzone and tesserix-customer).

Updated across all services:
- KEYCLOAK_URL / KEYCLOAK_ISSUER_URL in all app values-prod.yaml
- JWT RequestAuthentication policies (issuer + jwksUri)
- AuthorizationPolicy allowed hosts
- CORS allowOrigins
- Documentation and runbooks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add comprehensive README

Covers project overview, verticals, tech stack, architecture,
design system, security layers, PDPA compliance, local setup,
commands, env vars, project structure, and halal status tiers.

fix: align middleware cookie name with lib/auth (access_token)

successful login, creating an infinite redirect loop.

commit.message:
fix: OpenHands MCP proxy — block deepsearch, retry on 5xx, rerun config

Three fixes for OpenHands MCP integration issues found in the 30-task rerun:

1. Block deepsearch/deepsearch_read tool calls in the auth proxy. OpenHands'
   MCP client has a ~30s internal HTTP timeout that kills long-running
   deepsearch requests, crashing the agent (cilium-ebpf scored 0.0 vs 0.95
   baseline). The proxy now intercepts these calls and returns a helpful
   JSON-RPC error directing the agent to use keyword_search/nls_search.

2. Add retry logic (2 retries with 2s delay) for upstream 5xx errors and
   connection failures. CCX-dep-trace-258 got a 503 Service Unavailable
   mid-execution, crashing the agent.

3. Add rerun config (openhands_mcp_rerun2.json) for 11 tasks that need
   re-execution: 5 stuck builds, 1 DaytonaError, 4 no-MCP (code race
   condition where early tasks launched before fix was on disk), 1 proxy
   503 crash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix upload logo client : corrige le chemin storage

Le chemin userId/clients/clientId.ext échouait à cause des politiques RLS
(sous-dossier non autorisé). Nouveau chemin plat userId/client_clientId_ts.ext
compatible avec la politique existante du bucket logos.

Ajout d'un message d'erreur visible si l'upload échoue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: ProductionManager 생산 완료 EventBus 시그널 (SNA-76) (#10)

TDD 프로세스를 따라 생산 완료 기능을 구현했습니다:

1. **Red Phase**: 실패할 테스트 먼저 작성
   - production_completed 시그널 발신 확인
   - 슬롯 해제 확인
   - 완성된 빵 상태 확인

2. **Green Phase**: 최소 코드로 통과
   - ProductionSlot에 remaining_time 필드 추가
   - ProductionManager._process로 타이머 구현
   - 타이머 0 도달 시 complete_production 자동 호출
   - EventBus.production_completed 시그널 발신
   - EconomyEngine.sell_bread로 자동 판매

3. **Refactor Phase**: 코드 개선
   - gdformat으로 포맷팅 자동 수정
   - 테스트 122개 통과 확인

변경 사항:
- production_slot.gd: remaining_time 필드 추가
- production_manager.gd: _ready, _process, get_remaining_time 메서드 추가
- test_production_manager.gd: 생산 완료 테스트 4개 추가

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <claude@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add explicit BARRIER RULE comment: every ring must be passable

Full ring = must have ramp. Partial ring (gap) = steer through.
Rule documented in code block header with clear annotations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove hardcoded parent names from silence patterns

Build silence detection regex dynamically from PARENT_NAMES config
instead of hardcoding "elena|igor". Generic for any family deployment.

commit.message:
docs: update CLAUDE.md with tests subcommand, versioning, and test registry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add rate limiting and polite fetching to feed poller

Server: enforce 1-hour minimum between polls per data source.
Add 15s fetch timeout and User-Agent header to RSS and iCal fetchers.

Frontend: show last polled timestamp on each source card. Disable
Poll Now button during 1-hour cooldown period. Refetch source list
after successful poll to update timestamps.

repository.name: curtn-app
repository.description: Curtn - Performance art review platform (Letterboxd for live theater, comedy, and experimental performance)

commit.message:
feat: extensible category strategy config + automated QA scorer

Replace hardcoded if/else category logic with extensible CategoryStrategy
config (15 categories + _default). Adding a new category = 1 config entry,
zero route changes.

New files:
- category-strategy.ts: 3 generation modes (edit/reference/from_scratch),
  configurable retry_escalation, 3 prompt builders, shot compositions
- qa-criteria.ts: scoring weights, thresholds, action determination,
  batch halt logic, hero_contamination as independent escalation trigger
- qa-scorer.ts: 8-dimension QA scoring via Gemini text-only analysis
- process-qa/route.ts: decoupled QA chain (~15s/job, separate from gen)
- health/route.ts: chain health check, detects stale jobs, relaunches
- DB migration: total_api_calls column for cost tracking

Refactored:
- process-next: 3 gen modes + anti-loop (max retries) + qa_pending status
- results/[jobId]: strategy-based escalation + QA async trigger
- generate/route: extracted functions removed (single source of truth)
- gemini/client: added analyzeImages() for text-only QA analysis
- Results page: qa_pending state, QA feedback tooltip, hero_contamination

Flow: generate -> qa_pending -> QA chain -> approve/retry/flag

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remote-GPU 時の口パクを修正（render イベントに変更） (#49)

callRemoteGpuResponse で render_start/render_token/render_end を
バースト送信していたため、setInterval（120ms）が発火する前に
endStream() が呼ばれ口パクが動作しなかった。

render イベントに変更し、レンダラー側の typewriter.play() で
文字単位遅延（45ms/char）とリップシンクを処理させる。

Closes #48

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Update: 全站改版为白色简洁风格

- 首页：移除Canvas粒子动画，使用珠穆朗玛峰真实照片CSS剪影作为背景
- 所有页面：黑色背景改为白色，文字颜色反转为深色系
- 子页面：移除Canvas粒子动画，保持简洁白底
- myths页面：header渐变、timeline节点等全部适配白色主题
- _layouts/default.html：链接色改为#2563eb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
